name: wassengerhq
description: Official plugins from Wassenger for automating WhatsApp Business with AI agents.

plugins.name: wassenger-skills
plugins.description: 22 Agent Skills for automating WhatsApp Business on the official WABA — team setup with roles and per-device permissions, inbox triage with notes and archive, messaging with template handling, bulk campaigns, real-time webhooks, contacts management, label CRUD with namespacing, auto-assignment routing, canned quick replies, rule-based auto-replies, analytics and reporting, plus 7 industry playbooks (e-commerce, sales, customer support, real estate, restaurants, logistics, marketing) and migration guides from Twilio and Wati.
